title: All the news from the Google I/O 2026 Developer keynote
summary: All the news from the Google I/O 2026 Developer keynote
whyItMatters: Google announced the transition from assistive AI to independent agents, highlighting the launch of the Gemini 3.5 series and major updates to its Antigravity agent-first development platform. For mobile developers, the post introduces new Android CLI tools, the Android Bench evaluation leaderboard, and an automated Migration agent designed to rapidly conve…
